sub_modules.fp_fir_coeff_bank: Combinational coefficient ROM that packs the configured FIR tap coefficients onto a wide bus.
sub_modules.fp_fir_dot_product: Combinational FIR dot product over the current sample window and coefficient bus using binary32 decode and accumulation.
sub_modules.fp_real_to_binary32: Combinational converter from simulation real-valued FIR result back to IEEE-754 binary32 word format.
